name: useSkill
description: Load a skill file (workflow, prompt template, script, or configuration) for the agent to apply. Returns the file content for immediate processing.

filePath.description: Relative path to the skill file (e.g., 'skills/data-analysis.md', 'workflows/export.ts', 'prompts/system-v2.txt')

baseDir.description: Base directory to resolve the skill path against (defaults to '.')
